span.p: Acquired a set of assets / activities

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Is substantially all (~90pct+) of the
fair value of the gross assets acquired
concentrated in ONE identifiable asset
or a group of SIMILAR assets?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Does the set include an INPUT plus a
SUBSTANTIVE PROCESS that together
significantly contribute to the ability
to create outputs?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
BUSINESS COMBINATION
Acquisition method: FV model,
expense transaction costs,
recognize goodwill
